nasb.text: The presence of the Lord has scattered them, He will not continue to regard them; They did not honor the priests, They did not favor the elders.

esv.text: The Lord himself has scattered them; he will regard them no more; no honor was shown to the priests, no favor to the elders.

cnv.text: 耶和華親臨分散他們，不再看顧他們； 人不再尊重祭司，也不厚待長老。

ccb.text: 耶和华亲自驱散他们， 不再眷顾他们； 人们不再尊重祭司， 也不再敬重长老。
